entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the primary crop species studied for drought resistance

entities.name: C. YAMASHITAE
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea that showed growth similar to C. arietinum

entities.name: C. BIJUGUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: C. PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: C. CHORASSANICUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea that exhibited the lowest rooting depth

entities.name: C. JUDAICUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: C. CUNEATUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to survive and grow under water-limited conditions

entities.name: ROOTING DEPTH
entities.description: The vertical distance the roots grow into the growth medium

entities.name: ROOT DRY MASS
entities.description: The weight of the root system after being dried

entities.name: SHOOT DRY MASS
entities.description: The weight of the above-ground plant parts after being dried

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the plant's leaves

entities.name: ROOT TO TOTAL PLANT BIOMASS RATIO
entities.description: The proportion of the plant's total dry mass that is composed of roots

entities.name: LINEAR ROOT GROWTH PHASE
entities.description: The period during which roots grow at a constant linear rate

entities.name: DROUGHT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental state of water deficiency used during the experiment

entities.name: POLY(VINYL CHLORIDE) CYLINDERS
entities.description: The containers used to grow plants and measure root traits

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among the chickpea germplasm

entities.name: DROUGHT-AVOIDANCE
entities.description: A plant strategy to maintain water status by accessing deeper soil water

relationships.target: ROOT TO TOTAL PLANT BIOMASS RATIO
